ion>
Selectable

Selected: {{ selected }}
Since 0.7.6
rousel :autoplay="false" indicator-custom :indicator-inside="false" :overlay="gallery" @click="switchGallery(true)" >

Just add the same v-model to multiple Checkboxes, and set a native-value.

You have to wrap them on a Field.

ion>
        <b-field>
            <b-switch v-model="isAmPm">AM/PM</b-switch>
        </b-field>
        <b-field label="Select time">
            <b-clockpicker
                v-model="time"
                placeholder="Click to select..."
                :hour-format="format"
            >
                <b-button
                    label="Now"
                    type="is-primary"
                    icon-left="clock"
                    @click="time = new Date()"
                />
                <b-button
                    label="Clear"
                    type="is-danger"
                    icon-left="close"
                    outlined
                    @click="time = null"
                />
            </b-clockpicker>
        </b-field>
    </section>
</template
